nasb.text: Now Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon gave orders about Jeremiah through Nebuzaradan the captain of the bodyguard, saying,

esv.text: Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon gave command concerning Jeremiah through Nebuzaradan, the captain of the guard, saying,

cnv.text: 巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒提到耶利米，吩咐護衛長尼布撒拉旦說：

ccb.text: 至于耶利米，巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒吩咐护卫长尼布撒拉旦：
